text.title: Schedule Development Examples
text.summary: 3-activity worked example with critical path + project buffer.

example.title: Data-platform schedule snippet
example.context: Q3 data-platform delivery, three activities chained.
example.code:
| ID | Activity (verb-led) | WBS | Predecessors | Dep | O | M | P | PERT | Resource | Critical | |-----|-----------------------------|-----|-----------------|-----|---|---|---|------|----------|----------| | A01 | Design data model | 1.2 | | | 2 | 3 | 5 | 3.2 | team A | yes | | A02 | Implement ingest pipeline | 1.3 | A01 | FS | 4 | 6 | 10| 6.3 | team A | yes | | A03 | Smoke-test ingest | 1.4 | A02 | FS | 1 | 1 | 2 | 1.2 | team A | yes |
Project buffer PB = 4 days (≈ 0.4 × sum of PERT variances on critical chain).
example.commentary: All three activities lie on critical path; PB sized via CCPM 50%-buffer rule on aggregated variance. last_refreshed bumped weekly.
